## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO partnership between Isabel Luna's company and Marcel Santilli's fwd.digital agency.](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Isabel's company (part of Adventurous Group) focuses on tours/excursions in Mexican tourist destinations, with a strong organic traffic foundation but room for improvement in on-site conversion (18% currently).](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers AI-powered content creation at scale, with a focus on SEO-optimized articles and strategic keyword targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in collaboration, with Isabel seeking a dedicated SEO strategy and Marcel seeing potential in the travel niche.](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [A follow-up meeting will be scheduled to discuss specifics, including potential package deals for multiple sites.](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Current SEO Situation

  - [Part of Adventurous Group, focusing on tours/excursions in Mexican tourist destinations (Cancun, Cabo, Puerto Vallarta)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Strong organic traffic foundation (18% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Recently redesigned sites for some destinations (e.g., Cancun still has old design)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [No dedicated in-house SEO team, relying on agencies](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Current agency handling both paid and organic, with SEO lacking strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)

### AI in Content Creation

  - [Isabel's CEO (70s) pushing for AI integration in marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Isabel uses AI for content review and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Marcel's approach: AI-powered content creation workflows, combining machine efficiency with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI to analyze competitors, identify keyword gaps, and generate content ideas at scale](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Employs relevance scoring and prioritization based on business goals](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Generates outlines and drafts, with human editors for final touches](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Can produce 10-20 high-quality articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Offers programmatic research capabilities (e.g., Google Maps API for location-based content)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

### Collaboration Potential

  - [Isabel interested in maintaining input on content strategy and creation](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Marcel open to various levels of client involvement (from hands-off to highly collaborative)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Potential for package deal covering all three of Isabel's sites](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [fwd.digital flexible on pricing and engagement structure for similar content across multiple sites](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting (Marcel's EA to coordinate)](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Isabel to prepare specific questions/focus areas for next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Marcel to review Isabel's RFP and prepare tailored proposal](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Explore potential package deal for multiple sites](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Discuss pricing and engagement structure in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EKpN8_MUooBUt7NLGMnKKCzPXjvw-Gcz?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
